message:
feat(expr,frame): add @local variable bindings to expression engine and expand DataFrame operations

Expression engine (@-local support):
- Add Expr::Local variant and @-prefixed tokenizer for pandas-compatible
  local variable references (e.g., df.query("col > @threshold"))
- Extend EvalContext with locals BTreeMap and anchor_index for scalar
  broadcasting across DataFrame rows
- Add eval_str_with_locals, query_str_with_locals, evaluate_on_dataframe_with_locals,
  filter_dataframe_on_expr_with_locals public API functions
- Extend DataFrameExprExt trait with eval_with_locals and query_with_locals methods
- Fix Expr::Literal evaluation to broadcast using anchor index instead of
  returning UnanchoredLiteral error
- Support @local in delta evaluation for materialized views
- Add comprehensive tests for local scalar broadcasting, multi-local query
  filtering, and unknown binding error reporting

DataFrame and Index:
- Refactor fp-frame internals with expanded DataFrame operations
- Minor fp-index improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
